headline: Mateus Fernandes
body:
Tottenham hold talks over move for West Ham midfielder Mateus Fernandes. Talks ongoing amid some optimism a deal is possible. Man Utd have also shown interest in Portugal midfielder. bbc.co.uk/sport/football/art…

Link



Mateus Fernandes: Tottenham interested in West Ham midfielder

West Ham value Mateus Fernandes at £80m amid interest from Tottenham, who want a central midfielder this summer and have had a bid rejected for Newcastle's Sandro Tonali.
bbc.co.uk
